raw.message:
Get 50% Off Any Pizza, now through Monday! Order online with code 50PIZZA.
Online only. Exclusions apply.

hook.summary: High-quality close-ups of fresh pizza ingredients being sliced and prepared.
hook.visual_action: Rapid cuts of slicing tomatoes, kneading dough, and chopping green peppers.

scene_flow: Close-up montage of fresh ingredients being sliced and dough being kneaded.
A hand sprinkles a generous amount of shredded cheese onto a sauced pizza base.
The pizza is shown baking in an oven followed by a cheese-pull shot of a slice.
A macro shot of a hot pepperoni pizza.
Final graphic overlay showing a 50% off discount and promo code.
audience_proxy: Hungry adults and families looking for a high-value meal deal.
